problem id: e9a9b51f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10011001 -> 01110111
  11000101 -> 00001100
  00001000 -> 00100001
  10110011 -> 11011010
  10100000 -> 10010100
  11110011 -> 11010010
  01001001 -> 00101101
  00111001 -> 11100011

query: 11001010
predicted answer: 00110001
